sourcesInvestigated.source: installed official Hyprland 0.55.4 source headers (/usr/include/hyprland/src, shipped by the hyprland package)
sourcesInvestigated.finding: no animation style value enumeration exists in the shipped headers (style validation lives in compiled .cpp sources that the package does not install)

sourcesInvestigated.source: official typed Lua API stub (/usr/share/hypr/stubs/hl.meta.lua, 1251 lines)
sourcesInvestigated.finding: documents the hl.animation API but contains no style field value documentation at all

shows style USAGE only ('popin 87%' on windows leaves, 'fade' on layers/workspaces leaves) - usage examples are not an enumeration, and they reveal that styles are leaf-specific AND parameterized (a percentage argument), so a finite global dropdown would be wrong even in shape
carries no animation style metadata (animation tree records are not config options)
reports each record's CURRENT style but enumerates no valid values

whatWouldUnblock: official local evidence enumerating valid styles per animation leaf (for example, a future descriptions export or Lua stub that carries them), followed by an env-gated live proof of apply + exact revert + zero residue before any receipt, save path, or UI control is added
notTrustedAndNotUsed: guessing or inference from record names
currentBehaviorUnchanged: the style field is preserved byte-for-byte from the runtime readback on every save; the UI shows a disabled style row with this blocked reason; styled records remain save-only for preview purposes
